---
title: "PROBIT_LINK"
generated: true
description: "The probit link :math:`g( mu) =  Phi^{-1}( mu)`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:PROBIT_LINK -->
```python
PROBIT_LINK = Link(name='probit', link=(lambda mu: _norm.ppf(jnp.clip(mu, _EPS, 1.0 - _EPS))), linkinv=_probit_linkinv, mu_eta=_probit_mu_eta)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:PROBIT_LINK -->
The probit link $g(\mu) = \Phi^{-1}(\mu)$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
